title: GalaxySMP
description: The GalaxySMP modpack, which allows for players to explore the large expansive world and also space. From immersive aircraft and automobiles. You can use knowledge and also machinery to help you in your survival with the included 100+ mods.
body:
# GalaxySMP

The GalaxySMP modpack, is a modpack which allows players to explore the open world, different mods, and last but not least expand upon their skills through learning different mods this modpack provides.

# Features (1.34.7 & older)

- Ad Astra
- Skill Tree
- 100+ mods
- BetterEnd, BetterNether, BetterCombat

```
NOTE: If you have a system that does not have a nvidia GPU or doesnt have dedicated GPU. Disable Acedium.
```

# Features (1.38.0+)

- Applied Energisitcs 2
- Geophillic
- Underground Bunkers
- 100+ mods
